clusters.justification: These terms reflect the processing of emotional valence, physiological arousal, and stress responses broadly subserved by the large-scale salience and interoceptive neuro-axis.
This dimension captures the computation of incentive outcomes, cost-benefit analysis, and reinforcement learning predominantly mediated by frontostriatal reward circuitry.
These concepts form the macro-domain of internally-focused processing, encompassing autobiographical self-projection and the simulation of others' mental states via the default mode network.
